backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Manish Infratech billing app; defines types (Bill, LineItem, PartyProfile, etc.) and implements CRUD operations for bills, party GST numbers, user profiles, and financial summaries with access control enforcement.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping completed feature IDs to their affected files, related components, test IDs, and confidence levels for invoice print view updates, login screen redesign, and other UI changes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted reference document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a build/planning index for the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes (backgrounds, borders, charts, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Manish Infratech' that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (add bill, search, summary, party summary, company report, invoice print) wrapped in an AuthGuard and Layout shell.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Empty file placeholder for the AccessDeniedScreen component.
frontend/src/components/AddBillForm.tsx: Bill entry form component with up to 15 line items, autocomplete for party and product names, automatic GST (CGST/SGST at 18%) and round-off calculation, and form validation before submitting to the backend mutation.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that checks localStorage session via getIsAuthenticated and renders SimpleLoginScreen for unauthenticated users or the wrapped children for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AutocompleteInpu: A controlled input component that shows a filtered dropdown of suggestions as the user types, supporting click-outside dismissal and programmatic value selection.
frontend/src/components/BillResultsTable: Renders a styled table of Bill records with edit, delete, and print actions per row, using inline styles and mutation hooks for delete operations.
frontend/src/components/EditBillModal.ts: A modal form for editing an existing bill's party name, date, and line items, with live GST/total calculations and submission via the useEditBill mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePrintView: A print-optimized React component that renders a formatted tax invoice for a Bill, including company branding, line items table, GST breakdown, and amount in words.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application shell with a sticky header containing the Manish Infratech brand, navigation links, and a logout button, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/SimpleLoginScree: A styled login form that authenticates users via the useSimpleAuth hook, displaying branding, username/password fields, and error feedback.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of four summary cards displaying Total Revenue, Total GST, CGST, and SGST amounts formatted in INR with icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD for bills, autocomplete for party/product names, and fetching party GST numbers and reports.
frontend/src/hooks/useSimpleAuth.ts: Implements a simple username/password authentication mechanism using localStorage with hardcoded credentials for basic app access control.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Poppins fonts, defining Tailwind CSS layers with a white/blue/red theme using CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, plus print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddBillPage.tsx: Page component that renders a header with connection status and the AddBillForm component for creating new invoices.
frontend/src/pages/CompanyReportPage.tsx: Page that allows filtering bills by party name and date range to generate a detailed company billing report with CSV download support.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePrintPage.tsx: Page that fetches a bill by invoice ID from the URL and renders it in a printable InvoicePrintView with print and back navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/PartySummaryPage.tsx: Displays a per-party billing summary with date range filtering and inline GST number editing/saving functionality, showing totals for billed, paid, and pending amounts.
frontend/src/pages/SearchBillsPage.tsx: Provides a search interface to filter all bills by party name or invoice number, displaying results in a BillResultsTable component.
frontend/src/pages/SummaryPage.tsx: Shows a financial summary dashboard with date range filtering, aggregated revenue/GST/payment metrics via SummaryCards, and a CSV export option for filtered bills.
frontend/src/utils/dateConversion.ts: Utility functions for converting between nanosecond bigint timestamps, milliseconds, date input strings (YYYY-MM-DD), and formatted DD/MM/YYYY display strings.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Exports two helpers to format numbers as Indian Rupee currency strings or plain Indian-locale number strings using Intl.NumberFormat.
frontend/src/utils/numberToWords.ts: Converts a numeric amount to Indian currency words (e.g., 12500.50 → 'Rupees Twelve Thousand Five Hundred and Fifty Paise Only') using crore/lakh/thousand denomination breakdown.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/brand color palettes, Poppins/Inter fonts, CSS-variable-based semantic colors, and card/nav box shadows.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Manish Infratech billing/invoice web app project at version 31, including architecture notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features. Serves as a reference document for the app's authentication, bill storage, GST calculations, and UI requirements.
